options.text: A) Bulkheads constructed of approved non-combustible materials that can withstand the standard fire test for 30 minutes.
B) Bulkheads constructed of approved non-combustible materials that can withstand the standard fire test for 45 minutes.
C) Bulkheads constructed of approved non-combustible materials that can withstand the standard fire test for 15 minutes.
D) Bulkheads constructed of approved non-combustible materials but do not meet any of the requirements relative to smoke and flame nor limitations relative to temperature rise.
